name: JoAi: Upload Media

description.en: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.de: Lade ein Bild, Video oder eine andere Mediendatei in die Medienbibliothek deines Agenten hoch.
description.es: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.fr: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.ro: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.it: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.

bot: Use this when the user wants to add media to their agent. Ask for the file URL or content and an optional label.

inputs.name: URL

description.en: The URL of the media to upload
description.es: The URL of the media to upload
description.fr: The URL of the media to upload
description.ro: The URL of the media to upload
description.it: The URL of the media to upload

inputs.bot: The public URL of the media file to upload (image, video, etc.).

inputs.name: Label

description.en: A label or name for this media
description.de: Ein Label oder Name für dieses Medium
description.es: A label or name for this media
description.fr: A label or name for this media
description.ro: A label or name for this media
description.it: A label or name for this media

inputs.bot: An optional label to identify this media in the library.

inputs.name: Type
inputs.bot: The media type (e.g., image, video, audio, document).
